- 一般违规：1000万欧元或年营业额2%
- 严重违规：2000万欧元或年营业额4%

【考量因素】侵权性质、严重程度、故意程度、配合态度、财务状况

【著名案例】
- Google 5000万欧元
- Amazon 7.46亿欧元
- Meta 12亿欧元

实践中，大公司罚单动辄上亿，中小企业也需高度重视合规。

articles.title: 处罚
contentZh: 成员国应制定适用于违反本条例行为的处罚规则，并采取一切必要措施确保处罚执行。处罚应有效、相称、有威慑力。
成员国应在2018年5月25日前通知委员会这些规则，并应立即通知其后续任何影响这些规则的修订。
contentEn: Member States shall lay down the rules on penalties applicable to infringements of this Regulation and shall take all measures necessary to ensure that they are implemented. Such penalties shall be effective, proportionate and dissuasive.
Member States shall notify the Commission of those rules by 25 May 2018 and shall notify it without delay of any subsequent amendment affecting them.
articles.interpretation:
成员国处罚规则：

【立法要求】成员国制定处罚规则

【处罚原则】有效、相称、有威慑力

【通知义务】向欧盟委员会报告

实践中，各国处罚力度不同，但行政处罚（第83条）是主要手段。

articles.title: 处理与言论自由
articles.titleEn: Processing and freedom of expression and information
contentZh: 成员国可通过法律调和本条例赋予的权利与言论自由和信息自由的关系，包括处理个人数据用于新闻目的或学术、艺术或文学表达目的。
成员国应规定对透明度义务、访问权、更正权、限制权和删除权的豁免或减损，以便新闻目的的处理。
contentEn: Member States shall by law reconcile the right to the protection of personal data pursuant to this Regulation with the right to freedom of expression and information, including processing for journalistic purposes and the purposes of academic, artistic or literary expression.

Member States shall provide for exemptions or derogations from the following provisions: transparency obligations, the rights to access, rectification, restriction and erasure for processing for journalistic purposes.
articles.interpretation:
言论自由与数据保护的平衡：

【调和义务】成员国立法调和权利冲突

【适用范围】新闻、学术、艺术、文学表达

【豁免条款】可豁免透明度、访问、更正、删除等权利

实践中，媒体处理个人数据享有较大豁免空间。

articles.title: 公共数据再处理
articles.titleEn: Processing and public access to official documents
contentZh: 成员国个人数据已依据法律公开的，本条例应允许公众获取官方文件中的个人数据。
contentEn: Personal data in official documents held by a public authority or a public body or a private body for the performance of a task carried out in the public interest may be disclosed by the authority or body concerned in accordance with Union or Member State law to which the authority or body is subject in order to reconcile public access to official documents with the right to the protection of personal data pursuant to Article 14(5).
articles.interpretation:
公共文件中的个人数据处理：

【公开依据】欧盟或成员国法律

【调和原则】平衡信息公开与数据保护

【适用主体】公共机构或公共利益机构

实践中，政府信息公开需兼顾个人数据保护。

articles.title: 国民身份号码
articles.titleEn: Processing of the national identification number
contentZh: 成员国可制定国民身份号码处理的具体条件，以确保数据处理合法、公平、透明。
contentEn: Member States may further determine the specific conditions for the processing of a national identification number or any other identifier of general application. In that case the national identification number or any other identifier of general application shall be used only under appropriate safeguards for the rights and freedoms of the data subject pursuant to this Regulation.
articles.interpretation:
国民身份号码的特殊处理：

【成员国权限】可制定具体条件

【安全保障】必须采取适当保障措施

【使用限制】仅在必要情况下使用

实践中，身份证号、社保号等敏感标识符处理需谨慎。

articles.title: 员工数据处理
articles.titleEn: Processing in the context of employment
contentZh: 成员国可通过法律或集体协议制定员工数据处理的具体规则，包括招聘、履行合同、终止、健康安全等场景。
contentEn: Member States may, by law or by collective agreements, provide for more specific rules to ensure the protection of the rights and freedoms in respect of the processing of employees' personal data in the employment context, in particular for the purposes of the recruitment, the performance of the contract of employment, including discharge of obligations laid down by law or by collective agreements, management, planning and organisation of work, equality and diversity in the workplace, health and safety at work, and for the purposes of the exercise and enjoyment, on an individual or collective basis, of rights and benefits related to employment.
articles.interpretation:
员工数据处理的特殊规则：

【立法权限】成员国法律或集体协议

【适用场景】招聘、履约、离职、健康安全等

【保护要求】确保权利和自由保护

实践中，HR系统、考勤、绩效管理等均受本条影响。

articles.title: 存档、科研和统计
articles.titleEn: Safeguards and derogations relating to processing for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes
contentZh: 为公共利益存档、科学或历史研究或统计目的处理个人数据的，应采取适当保障措施，如假名化。成员国可对数据主体权利作出减损。
这些保障措施应确保技术和组织措施到位，特别是确保尊重数据最小化原则。
contentEn: Processing for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes, shall be subject to appropriate safeguards, in accordance with this Regulation, for the rights and freedoms of the data subject.
Those safeguards shall ensure that technical and organisational measures are in place in particular in order to ensure respect for the principle of data minimisation.
articles.interpretation:
科研和存档的保障措施：

【适用范围】公共利益存档、科研、历史研究、统计

【保障措施】假名化、数据最小化等

【权利减损】成员国可限制部分权利

实践中，医学研究、社会科学研究、档案馆等适用本条。

articles.title: 保密义务
contentZh: 本条例不影响成员国法律规定的职业保密义务，如律师、医生等专业人员的保密责任。
成员国可规定仅在预防、调查、侦查或起诉刑事犯罪或执行刑事处罚所必需的情况下披露个人数据。
contentEn: This Regulation shall not affect the application of the law of the Member States which provides for the obligation of professional secrecy or other equivalent obligations of secrecy, including a statutory obligation of secrecy.

Member States may provide for the disclosure of personal data only where it is necessary for the purposes of the prevention, investigation, detection or prosecution of criminal offences or the execution of criminal penalties.
articles.interpretation:
保密义务优先适用：

【适用范围】职业保密义务（律师、医生等）

【优先原则】GDPR不影响保密义务

【披露限制】仅在刑事侦查等必要情况下披露

articles.title: 教会和宗教团体
articles.titleEn: Existing data protection rules of churches and religious associations
contentZh: 在成员国设有营业机构的教会和宗教团体，如其已制定符合本条例的数据保护规则，可继续适用。
基于第1款处理个人数据的教会和宗教团体应接受独立监督机构的监督，该机构可以是专门的，但须符合本条例第六章规定的条件。
contentEn: In Member States in which churches and religious associations or communities apply, at the time of entry into force of this Regulation, comprehensive rules relating to the protection of natural persons with regard to processing, such rules may continue to apply, provided that they are brought into line with this Regulation.

Churches and religious associations which process personal data on the basis of paragraph 1 shall be subject to independent supervision by a body which may be specific, provided that it fulfils the conditions laid down in Chapter VI of this Regulation.
articles.interpretation:
教会和宗教团体的特殊安排：

【继续适用】已有数据保护规则可继续适用

【合规要求】必须与GDPR保持一致

【独立监督】需设立独立监督机构

articles.title: 授权法案
contentZh: 欧盟委员会被授权在特定情形下通过授权法案，制定技术性规定。授权自生效日起五年有效。
委员会应在五年期限结束前至少九个月提交关于授权的报告。
contentEn: The power to adopt delegated acts is conferred on the Commission subject to the conditions laid down in this Article.

The power to adopt delegated acts referred to in Article 12(8) and Article 43(8) shall be conferred on the Commission for a period of five years from 24 May 2016. The Commission shall draw up a report in respect of the delegation of power not later than nine months before the end of the five-year period.
articles.interpretation:
授权法案是欧盟委员会的立法工具：

【授权范围】技术性规定

【有效期】五年

【报告义务】委员会需定期报告

articles.title: 委员会程序
contentZh: 认证机构应由监管机构认可。认可应符合条件：独立于控制者或处理者、具备专业能力、符合ISO/IEC标准等。
欧盟委员会通过实施法案时，应由委员会协助，适用审查程序。
contentEn: The Commission shall be assisted by a committee. That committee shall be a committee within the meaning of Regulation (EU) No 182/2011.
Where reference is made to this paragraph, Article 5 of Regulation (EU) No 182/2011 shall apply.
articles.interpretation:
委员会程序是实施法案的程序要求：

【协助机构】委员会

【适用程序】审查程序

【法律依据】(EU) No 182/2011

articles.title: 生效日期
contentZh: 本条例于2018年5月25日生效，自生效日起适用。但第99(2)条自2016年5月24日生效。
本条例应在欧盟官方公报上公布后第二十天生效。
contentEn: This Regulation shall enter into force on the twentieth day following that of its publication in the Official Journal of the European Union.
It shall apply from 25 May 2018.
articles.interpretation:
GDPR生效时间：

【通过时间】2016年4月27日

【生效时间】2018年5月25日

【过渡期】约两年过渡期

【适用范围】所有欧盟成员国直接适用

articles.title: 与原指令的关系
contentZh: 自2018年5月25日起，第95/46/EC号指令废止。已根据该指令通过的成员国法律应继续适用，直至与新条款不一致。
引用原指令的视为引用本条例。
contentEn: Directive 95/46/EC is repealed with effect from 25 May 2018.
References to the repealed Directive shall be construed as references to this Regulation.
articles.interpretation:
GDPR取代原数据保护指令：

【废止对象】第95/46/EC号指令

【废止时间】2018年5月25日

【引用转换】引用原指令的视为引用GDPR

articles.title: 与其他法律的关系
contentZh: 本条例不影响成员国在GDPR生效前与国际组织签署的国际协议效力。
委员会可在评估这些协议执行情况后，提议与相关第三国重新谈判，以获得符合本条例要求的新协议。
contentEn: This Regulation shall not affect the application of international agreements concluded between Member States and third countries before 24 May 2016 which comply with the conditions set out in Article 26(1) of Directive 95/46/EC.

The Commission may, after assessing the implementation of those agreements, propose that the Council authorise the opening of negotiations with the third countries concerned with a view to obtaining a new agreement complying with the requirements of this Regulation.
articles.interpretation:
已有国际协议的效力：

【保护原则】不影响已有协议

【条件】符合原指令要求

【新协议】委员会可提议重新谈判

articles.title: 委员会报告
contentZh: 欧盟委员会应于2020年5月25日及此后每四年评估本条例的适用情况，并向欧洲议会、理事会和经社理事会报告。
委员会应在适当情况下提出本条例的修订建议。
contentEn: The Commission shall, by 25 May 2020 and every four years thereafter, submit a report on the evaluation and review of this Regulation to the European Parliament and to the Council.
The Commission shall, where appropriate, submit proposals for amendments of this Regulation.
articles.interpretation:
委员会定期评估GDPR：

【首次报告】2020年5月25日

【后续报告】每四年一次

【报告对象】欧洲议会、理事会、经社理事会

【修法建议】可提出修订建议

articles.title: 其他法律审查
articles.titleEn: Review of other Union legal acts on data protection
contentZh: 欧盟委员会应审查本条例与部门性数据保护法规的关系，并在必要时提出修订建议。
委员会应特别注意本条例第12(2)条和第14(2)条的规定。
contentEn: The Commission shall, if necessary, submit appropriate proposals with a view to amending other Union legal acts on the protection of personal data, in order to ensure consistency with this Regulation.
The Commission shall, in particular, take into account the provisions of Article 12(2) and Article 14(2) of this Regulation.
articles.interpretation:
与其他法规的一致性审查：

【审查对象】部门性数据保护法规

【审查目的】确保与GDPR一致

【修法建议】必要时提出修订建议

articles.title: 最终条款
contentZh: 本条例具有整体约束力，直接适用于所有成员国。
本条例应在欧盟官方公报上公布后第二十天生效。
contentEn: This Regulation shall be binding in its entirety and directly applicable in all Member States.
This Regulation shall enter into force on the twentieth day following that of its publication in the Official Journal of the European Union.
articles.interpretation:
GDPR的法律效力：

【约束力】整体约束力

【直接适用】直接适用于所有成员国

【无需转化】无需成员国立法转化

这是「条例」形式立法的直接效力特点。
